Proposal.title: Proposal for Priya & Arjun
Proposal.brief: Couple booking a 3-day wedding in Mumbai — Dec 12-14. 40 guests for the main wedding, 40 for sangeet, 150 for haldi. Vegetarian-leaning with some non-veg starters.

parsedBrief.notes: 40 guests for main wedding, 40 for sangeet, 150 for haldi

contentJson.intro: Thank you for choosing Demo Catering & Banquet to be part of your special celebration! We're delighted to craft a memorable 3-day wedding experience across your Haldi, Sangeet, and Wedding ceremonies in Mumbai this December. This proposal reflects a thoughtful blend of vegetarian favorites and select non-vegetarian starters to delight your guests across all three events.
terms: Prices quoted in INR and valid for 14 days from proposal date
50% advance payment required to confirm booking; balance due 7 days before first event
Booking fee of ₹2,500 will be adjusted against final invoice
Final guest count must be confirmed 5 days prior to each event
Menu substitutions available during tasting session at no extra charge
Service staff timings: Captains & Waiters minimum 6 hours, Chefs minimum 8 hours per event
Any additional requirements or changes post-confirmation may incur revision charges
Cancellation policy: 30 days notice for 75% refund; 15-29 days for 50%; less than 15 days non-refundable
Venue coordination and logistics to be discussed during initial consultation
contentJson.title: Proposal for Priya & Arjun

sections.intro: A vibrant celebration calls for an equally vibrant feast. We recommend our Wedding Platinum package to ensure your largest gathering enjoys premium variety and live culinary experiences.

sections.title: Planning & Booking Essentials

inclusions: Complete catering for 3-day wedding celebration (Haldi, Sangeet, Wedding)
Premium Wedding Platinum package for 150 guests (Haldi)
Wedding Gold packages for 40 guests each (Sangeet & Wedding)
Live culinary counters and interactive food stations
Professional service staff: Captains, Waiters, and Chefs across all events
Mocktails, welcome drinks, and beverage service
Pre-event menu tasting session
Date reservation and event coordination
Setup, service, and cleanup for all three days

Proposal.title: Proposal for Priya & Arjun
Proposal.brief: Couple booking a 1-day wedding in Mumbai — Dec 12. 20 guests for the main wedding, 20 for sangeet, 150 for haldi. Vegetarian-leaning with some non-veg starters. Budget around 2 lakhs.

parsedBrief.notes: Multiple events: 20 guests for main wedding, 20 for sangeet, 150 for haldi

contentJson.intro: Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! We're thrilled to craft a memorable celebration for your special day on December 12th in Mumbai. Understanding you have three distinct events—an intimate 20-guest wedding ceremony, a 20-guest sangeet, and a vibrant 150-guest haldi—we've designed a proposal that honors each moment while respecting your budget of ₹2 lakhs. Our approach balances vegetarian favorites with select non-vegetarian starters to delight all your guests.
terms: Proposal valid for 14 days from date of issue
50% advance required to confirm booking; balance due 3 days before event
Booking fee of ₹2,500 will be adjusted against final invoice
Final guest count must be confirmed 5 days prior to event
Menu substitutions available with 7 days' notice
Cancellations: 50% refund if cancelled 15+ days before event; no refund within 14 days
Prices inclusive of GST
Venue coordination charges (if any) to be confirmed based on location
contentJson.title: Proposal for Priya & Arjun

sections.intro: Your largest gathering deserves a comprehensive package that covers everything from appetizers to desserts, ensuring your 150 guests enjoy a complete culinary experience.

items.name: Wedding Silver Package
items.description: Complete meal package including 4 starters, 6 mains, 2 desserts, and soft drinks—perfectly suited for your haldi celebration with vegetarian-leaning options

sections.title: Haldi Celebration – 150 Guests

sections.intro: For your intimate wedding ceremony and sangeet (40 guests total), we recommend à la carte selections that offer flexibility and premium quality.

items.name: Paneer Tikka
items.description: Marinated cottage cheese in tandoor—a vegetarian favorite that's always a hit

items.name: Murgh Tikka
items.description: Tandoori chicken tikka for your non-vegetarian guests

items.name: Dal Makhani
items.description: Slow-cooked black lentils—a rich, comforting main course

items.name: Gulab Jamun
items.description: Warm milk dumplings in syrup to end on a sweet note

sections.title: Wedding Ceremony & Sangeet – 20 Guests Each

contentJson.intro: Thank you for choosing Demo Catering & Banquet to be part of your special celebration! We're delighted to craft a memorable 3-day wedding experience across your Haldi, Sangeet, and Wedding ceremonies in Mumbai this December. This proposal reflects a thoughtful blend of vegetarian favorites and select non-vegetarian starters to delight your guests across all three events.
terms: Prices quoted in INR and valid for 14 days from proposal date
50% advance payment required to confirm booking; balance due 7 days before first event
Booking fee of ₹2,500 will be adjusted against final invoice
Final guest count must be confirmed 5 days prior to each event
Menu substitutions available during tasting session at no extra charge
Service staff timings: Captains & Waiters minimum 6 hours, Chefs minimum 8 hours per event
Any additional requirements or changes post-confirmation may incur revision charges
Cancellation policy: 30 days notice for 75% refund; 15-29 days for 50%; less than 15 days non-refundable
Venue coordination and logistics to be discussed during initial consultation

contentJson.intro: Congratulations on your upcoming wedding! We're thrilled to craft a memorable celebration for your special day on December 12th in Mumbai. Understanding you have three distinct events—an intimate 20-guest wedding ceremony, a 20-guest sangeet, and a vibrant 150-guest haldi—we've designed a proposal that honors each moment while respecting your budget of ₹2 lakhs. Our approach balances vegetarian favorites with select non-vegetarian starters to delight all your guests.
terms: Proposal valid for 14 days from date of issue
50% advance required to confirm booking; balance due 3 days before event
Booking fee of ₹2,500 will be adjusted against final invoice
Final guest count must be confirmed 5 days prior to event
Menu substitutions available with 7 days' notice
Cancellations: 50% refund if cancelled 15+ days before event; no refund within 14 days
Prices inclusive of GST
Venue coordination charges (if any) to be confirmed based on location
contentJson.title: Proposal for Priya & Arjun

Project.name: Reena Khanna — Proposal for Reena Khanna
Project.description: Couple booking a 3-day wedding in Mumbai — Dec 12-14. 400 guests for the main wedding, 200 for sangeet, 150 for haldi. Vegetarian-leaning with some non-veg starters. Budget around 25-30 lakhs.

Task.title: Finalize menu and any dietary substitutions
Lock in staff roster (captains, chefs, helpers)
Site visit to confirm kitchen access + power
Day-of setup at venue (4 hours before service)
Send final invoice for balance amount
Gear check + memory cards formatted + batteries charged
Visit venue to scout lighting + angles
Share day-of timeline with client + venue
Backup all raw footage to two drives
Send album design proof for approval
Send final invoice + album press order
